pillars.body1: We build with what the site asks for. Stone, timber, lime, brass — left to age in their own way.
pillars.body2: What we make should outlive us. We design for the long quiet life of a building, not the short loud life of an image.
pillars.body3: The best architecture disappears into daily life. We work toward rooms that are forgotten the moment they are entered.

philosophy.body: We are a small workshop of architects, designers, and gardeners. We work slowly, draw constantly, and believe that a building is a long sentence written into a place. Each room is a clause. Each window, a held breath.

stats: Twelve years. Forty-three projects. One philosophy.

cta.headline: Have a site? Let's listen to it.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.intro: A working archive of buildings, interiors, and gardens.

partners.title: Eight people. One workshop.
partners.intro: Metropolitan is held together by a small group of architects and designers who share a single table and two cities.

contact.title: Tell us about your site.
contact.intro: We answer every message — usually within 48 hours.
